columns.name: compliance_certifications
columns.constraints: CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`compliance_certifications`))

columns.name: attachment_storage_limit_mb
columns.constraints: NOT NULL DEFAULT 1000 COMMENT 'Storage limit for attachments in MB'

columns.name: settings
columns.constraints: CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`settings`))

columns.name: features
columns.constraints: CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`features`))

columns.name: effective_date
columns.constraints: NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

columns.name: permissions
columns.constraints: CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`permissions`))

columns.name: recovery_codes
columns.constraints: CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`recovery_codes`))

columns.name: device_info
columns.constraints: CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`device_info`))

columns.name: login_history
columns.constraints: CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`login_history`))

columns.name: device_info
columns.constraints: CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`device_info`))
